# Rating

A star rating component for collecting or displaying ratings. Composed of multiple sub-components for flexible layout.

## Import

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
import { Rating } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

// Usage: <Rating.Control />, <Rating.Item />, etc.

// Named imports (backwards compatible)
import { Rating, RatingControl, RatingItem, RatingLabel, RatingItemIndicator } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Nested Property | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Rating` | - | The root wrapper (renders `RatingGroup.Root`). Manages rating value and state |
| `RatingControl` | `Rating.Control` | Container for the rating items |
| `RatingItem` | `Rating.Item` | An individual rating item (star) |
| `RatingItemIndicator` | `Rating.ItemIndicator` | The visual indicator inside each rating item |
| `RatingLabel` | `Rating.Label` | A label for the rating group |

## Rating (Root) Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `count` | `number` | `5` | The total number of rating items |
| `defaultValue` | `number` | - | Initial rating value for uncontrolled usage |
| `value` | `number` | - | Controlled rating value |
| `onValueChange` | `(details: { value: number }) => void` | - | Callback fired when the rating changes |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the rating items |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | - | The color palette for filled rating items |
| `allowHalf` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether half-star ratings are allowed |
| `readOnly` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the rating is read-only (display only) |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the rating is disabled |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the root element |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
<Rating defaultValue={3} count={5}>
  <Rating.Control>
    {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((index) => (
      <Rating.Item key={index} index={index}>
        <Rating.ItemIndicator />
      </Rating.Item>
    ))}
  </Rating.Control>
</Rating>

// Named imports (backwards compatible)
<Rating defaultValue={3} count={5}>
  <RatingControl>
    {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((index) => (
      <RatingItem key={index} index={index}>
        <RatingItemIndicator />
      </RatingItem>
    ))}
  </RatingControl>
</Rating>
```

### With label

```jsx
<Rating defaultValue={4}>
  <Rating.Label>Rate this product</Rating.Label>
  <Rating.Control>
    {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((index) => (
      <Rating.Item key={index} index={index}>
        <Rating.ItemIndicator />
      </Rating.Item>
    ))}
  </Rating.Control>
</Rating>
```

### Read-only display

```jsx
<Rating value={4.5} readOnly allowHalf>
  <Rating.Control>
    {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((index) => (
      <Rating.Item key={index} index={index}>
        <Rating.ItemIndicator />
      </Rating.Item>
    ))}
  </Rating.Control>
</Rating>
```

### With color palette

```jsx
<Rating defaultValue={3} colorPalette="orange">
  <Rating.Control>
    {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((index) => (
      <Rating.Item key={index} index={index}>
        <Rating.ItemIndicator />
      </Rating.Item>
    ))}
  </Rating.Control>
</Rating>
```

## Features

- Compound component pattern for fully customizable rating layouts
- Supports half-star ratings for finer granularity
- Read-only mode for display-only use cases
- Configurable number of rating items
- Keyboard accessible with arrow key navigation
- Each sub-component forwards refs to its underlying DOM element
